props.title: Cloud Solutions Architect
props.overview: Architected and deployed a comprehensive AWS cloud infrastructure for a growing Australian tech startup, delivering scalable, secure, and highly available solutions that enabled seamless business growth and operational efficiency.
key_deliverables: Designed and implemented a secure and scalable AWS cloud infrastructure, utilizing services such as EC2, VPC, S3, ELB, RDS, Auto Scaling, and IAM.
Migrated existing applications and databases to AWS, ensuring minimal downtime and data integrity throughout the process.

props.title: Laboratory Assistant
props.overview: Provided comprehensive academic and technical support to instructors and students in university laboratory settings, troubleshooting equipment issues, facilitating student assessments, and ensuring smooth laboratory operations across multiple academic programs.
key_deliverables: Managed and maintained laboratory equipment, ensuring all devices were in optimal working condition for student use.
Provided technical support and troubleshooting assistance to students during laboratory sessions, fostering a conducive learning environment.
Assisted instructors in monitoring student progress and performance during lab activities, contributing to effective student assessments.

props.title: Social Survey Researcher on Youth Cyber Safety
props.overview: Conducted comprehensive interviews to gather qualitative data on personal experiences, performed data preprocessing and statistical analysis to identify key trends, and contributed to developing solutions aimed at enhancing the well-being of young people in digital environments.
key_deliverables: Investigated cybersecurity measures, content moderation, and educational resources effectiveness in protecting youth (ages 16-30) from online risks
Conducted mixed-methods study with anonymous online surveys and semi-structured interviews (60 participants each interviewer)
Performed statistical analysis including Chi-Square and paired t-tests, plus thematic analysis for qualitative insights
Identified key platforms (Facebook, Instagram) associated with cyberbullying and developed multi-faceted prevention strategies
